title: elsholtzia cyprianii
intro: Elsholtzia cyprianii, also known as Vietnamese mint or Vietnamese coriander, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elsholtzia cyprianii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Elsholtzia cyprianii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, and is also used as a flavoring agent in cooking.
